exchange: compression flow - ctx set plus all conversation turns

turns.user: Remember this: my favourite colour is cobalt blue. Acknowledge it and give me one sentence about the history of cobalt blue as a pigment.
Also remember: my lucky number is 73. Give me one interesting mathematical fact about 73.
And note: I always prefer metric units. Confirm all three things you are keeping track of for me.
What is the capital of France and what is it known for?
Recall: what are the three preferences I told you at the start of our conversation?
